data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for bulk code generation for partners.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Bulk code generation for partners', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for bulk code generation, there are no specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how this requirement is implemented or validated. This leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation of bulk code generation for partners.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the bulk code generation requirement.
